title: 2014 Press Releases
summary: This is a chronological archive listing page of all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2014, containing dozens of unrelated items spanning monetary policy statements, regulatory actions, enforcement actions, banking applications, and administrative announcements. The page is not a single coherent source but rather an index of approximately 100+ separate press releases. Per CORE RULE 5, listing pages are non-archiveable.
key_points: This is a listing page (index) of all Fed press releases from 2014, not a single article
Contains mixed content types: FOMC statements, regulatory guidance, enforcement actions, banking applications, term deposit offerings
Published approximately 12 years ago (2014), making it a stale historical record
Cannot be treated as a single archiveable research note due to multiple unrelated items
Relevant macro catalysts from 2014 (e.g., end of QE3, rate decisions) are embedded within but not accessible as discrete sources from this page
why_it_matters: This source is a navigational archive page that aggregates 2014 Federal Reserve communications. Individual press releases from this page (such as FOMC statements on 12/17/2014, 10/29/2014, and the FOMC projections release) would be individually relevant and archiveable, but the listing page itself is not a direct source of market structure or macro catalyst content and must be rejected per CORE RULE 5.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page — CORE RULE 5 mandates rejection for listing pages
Source is a chronological index/listing page containing ~100+ separate press releases, not a single coherent source
Cannot be treated as a single archiveable research note
Individual 2014 FOMC statements and releases embedded in this index would be individually relevant but must be accessed as separate sources
Suggested_status incorrectly set to 'review_queue' when clear rejection criteria apply per CORE RULE 5

notes: PER RULE 6 VIOLATION — listing_page treated as non-archiveable. This is a Federal Reserve press release index for calendar year 2014 containing dozens of unrelated items. Not suitable as a single research note. Individual items (FOMC statements, rate decisions, regulatory actions) from this period would be relevant if accessed as separate sources.
